m	Z	m

assert_dtype_equalU
Return a random symmetric (Hermitian) matrix.
    If 'dim_or_eigv' is an integer N, return a NxN matrix, with eigenvalues
        uniformly distributed on (-1,1).
    If 'dim_or_eigv' is  1-D real array 'a', return a matrix whose
                      eigenvalues are 'a'.
    rQ
